title: Hydrangea yaoshanensis
taxonomy: Hydrangea yaoshanensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Hydrangeaceae. It is native to China and is classified as a shrub. The species name 'yaoshanensis' suggests that it is endemic to Yaoshan, a mountain range in China. The classification of Hydrangea yaoshanensis is further detailed within the taxonomy of the plant kingdom. Its classification into the family Hydrangeaceae places it among other hydrangea species.
